title: Notification for Corrigendum in target notification under PAT II for Railway sector.in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (e) of section 14 of the said Act, in consultation with the Bureau of Energy Efficiency.

F. 3542(aH) aretha 29 fearax, 2015 Gre Thar WaT ATI MINISTRY OF POWER NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 8th June, 2016 S.O. 2022(E).—Whereas the Central Government, in consultation with the Bureau of Energy Efficiency, having regard to the intensity or quantity of energy consumed and the amount of investment required for switching over to the energy efficient equipment and capacity of industry to invest in it and availability of the energy, energy efficient machinery and equipment required by the industry, notified under clause (e) of section 14 of the Energy Conservation Act, 2001 (52 of 2001) [hereinafter referred to as the said Act], nine energy intensive industries and other establishments specified in the Schedule to the said Act, as designated consumers by notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Power number S.O 394(E), dated the 12" March, 2007 [hereinafter referred to as the said Order] published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part IT, section 3, sub-section (ii), dated the 19" March, 2007; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (e) of section 14 of the said Act, the Central Government, in consultation with the Bureau of Energy Efficiency, hereby makes the following amendments further to amend the said Order, namely:- In sub-paragraph 7 relating to Railways, in clause (a), in the Table,- (i) for the entries,- “S.No Zonal Railway”, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “S.No Zonal Railway (1) (2) (ii) against serial number 7, for the entry in column (2), the following entry shall be substituted, namely:- “North Frontier’; (iii) against serial number 11, for the entry in column (2), the following entry shall be substituted, namely:- “South East Central’. [F. No. 10/13/2002-EM] RAJ PAL, Economic Adviser Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, section 3, sub-section (ii) vide number S.O. 394(E), dated the 12th March, 2007 and subsequently amended vide S.O. 3542(E) dated the 29th December, 2015. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-1 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-1 10054. -- 2 of 2 --
